entities.name: Partial success principle

relationships.context: Aviato provides profile lookup as first intelligence source
Gmail provides email thread intelligence as second source
LinkedIn planned as third intelligence source (not yet implemented)
Module specifically formats Gmail API results into intelligence blocks
Enrichment workflow designed to succeed partially rather than fail completely
Combined intelligence appended to Intelligence Log section in profile YAML
